历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 38717 → 25790 → 23984 → 24681 → 39850. From 2021 to 2023, there was a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), 2024 remained basically stable, and in 2025, due to adjustments in major group structure (re-selection of chemistry group), there was a significant backward shift to 39850, with drastic fluctuations in the past two years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 106 students in both 2021 and 2022, 103 in 2023, 108 in 2024 and 2025, and expanded to 122 in 2026, an increase of 14 students compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 13%). The significant increase in the plan helps alleviate competition for admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, comprehensive type. Its Soft Science University Ranking has steadily risen in recent years: 94th in 2021 → 99th in 2022 → 96th in 2023 → 90th in 2024 → 89th in 2025 → 86th in 2026. The continuous improvement in ranking reflects the enhancement of the university's overall strength. The university has not appeared in recent reputation incident records, with stable public opinion and no major negative events. Its Douyin popularity ranks 25th overall (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of 1.83 million, indicating a mid-to-high level of attention among 211 universities. Exposure on short video platforms has a certain positive effect on application popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of registrations for the 2026 Hubei Province college entrance examination is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (about 391,200). The number of Physics Category candidates has been growing continuously in recent years (147,000 in 2021 → 250,000 in 2025), estimated at about 251,000 in 2026 by proportion. The competition base is expanding, with little fluctuation in recent years. Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, and recruits across provinces in Hubei, with no local admission preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal backward shift in 2025 rankings due to major group adjustments, the significant 13% enrollment expansion in 2026 to alleviate competition, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 41449, with a range of 40949–41949.
